HTML template for a user registration form extending a base layout.

# Purpose
This template file is used in a web application to define a registration page. It extends a base template, `base.html`, and specifies content for the `header` and `content` blocks. The `header` block includes a title, "Register", while the `content` block contains a form with fields for a username and password, both of which are required, and a submit button labeled "Register".
